title: Starter Schema (template starter content)
description: Minimal JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 starter shipped under templates/json/ for downstream consumers to copy into their own schemas/ directory and adapt. This file is starter content and is NOT an active contract while it remains under templates/. See templates/json/README.md for adoption guidance and schemas/README.md for schema conventions.

name.description: Human-readable identifier for the example resource. Required and must be a non-empty string. Sample values are obviously fake (for example, "example-service").

enabled.description: Whether the example resource is active. Required.

description.description: Optional free-form description of what the resource represents.

tags.description: Optional list of short string tags. Each tag must be a non-empty string and the list must not contain duplicates.
